page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: microRNA PREdiction From small RNA-seq data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Uses expression patterns of miRNA and follows the criteria for plant microRNA annotation to accurately predict plant miRNAs from one or more small RNA-Seq data samples of the same species.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Uses expression patterns of miRNA and follows the criteria for plant microRNA annotation to accurately predict plant miRNAs from one or more small RNA-Seq data samples of the same species.
